mapper.sql: id, file_name, original_name, relative_path, file_path, file_hash, file_size, file_type, title, status, chunk_count, last_indexed_at, error_message, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.select: select from cook_ai_knowledge_documents where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
select from cook_ai_knowledge_documents where relative_path = #{relativePath} and deleted_at is null limit 1

select from cook_ai_knowledge_documents where deleted_at is null
and status = #{status}
and (file_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or relative_path like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by updated_at desc, id desc
mapper.update: update cook_ai_knowledge_documents set file_name = #{fileName}, original_name = #{originalName}, file_path = #{filePath}, file_hash = #{fileHash}, file_size = #{fileSize}, file_type = #{fileType}, title = #{title}, status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_ai_knowledge_documents set status = 'indexing', error_message = null, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null

update cook_ai_knowledge_documents set status = 'indexed', chunk_count = #{chunkCount}, last_indexed_at = current_timestamp, error_message = null, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_ai_knowledge_documents set status = 'failed', error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
update cook_ai_knowledge_documents set status = 'offline', updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
